generated_oml:
instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor defined within BIM environment for building monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor defined within BIM environment for building monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor defined within BIM environment for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingHumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingCO2Sensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Integrated real-time operational data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler
]

instance RealTimeDataEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing real-time sensor data from building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for transforming BIM models into structured DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of building using Building Information Modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for building lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis capabilities for infrastructure optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization capabilities for operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations and insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making support for AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building simulation for lifecycle management"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Infrastructure analysis insights for optimization"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational efficiency optimization insights"
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for facility management"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for infrastructure health"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support insights for AECO stakeholders"
]

instance DTFrameworkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework coordinating roles for building lifecycle management"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for device modeling within BIM environment"
]

instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for real-time monitoring and control"
]

instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for service integration via standardized extension points"
]

instance BuildingAsset : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building asset in AECO domain covering entire lifecycle phases: design, construction, operation, refurbishment"
]

instance BuildingSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building system encompassing lifecycle from design to refurbishment"
    base:contains BuildingAsset, DTFrameworkEnvironment
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a modular architecture with a centralized hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange and coordinating roles such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers, using standardized extension points for integrating custom analytics and services to support holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses device modeling within BIM (Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to address BIM's static limitations), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts, runtime operation with real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for system monitoring and control, and evolution through modular integration of custom services (DT Engineers) to adapt to operational requirements, with Facility Managers overseeing monitoring and control activities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system evaluates the entanglement of the resulting DT using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure how well the DT reflects its physical counterpart through continuous data synchronization and model validation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment utilizes a cloud-based model-driven framework for scalable DT instances, with Unreal Engine 5 providing high-fidelity visualization for immersive monitoring and control interfaces. The modular architecture includes standardized extension points for seamless integration of custom analytics and services without full redeployment, ensuring low-overhead updates and high availability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is addressed as a non-functional requirement, with the modular architecture's standardized extension points enabling integration of custom services and analytics; specific data exchange protocols or dependencies on external systems are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with BIM standards for semantic modeling of building components, standardized extension points for interoperable service integration, and a unified semantic foundation addressing BIM's limitations in representing Building Control System (BCS) components within AECO industry contexts."
]
